parameters.query: UPDATE speed_audits SET status = 'deferred' WHERE id = '{{ $('Parse Slack Payload').first().json.audit_id }}';

SELECT 
  sa.id,
  sa.audit_date,
  sa.status,
  COUNT(sai.id) FILTER (WHERE sai.approved = TRUE) as approved_count,
  COUNT(sai.id) as total_count
FROM speed_audits sa
LEFT JOIN speed_audit_items sai ON sai.audit_id = sa.id
WHERE sa.id = '{{ $('Parse Slack Payload').first().json.audit_id }}'
GROUP BY sa.id, sa.audit_date, sa.status;

SELECT 
  sai.item_code,
  sai.issue_type,
  sai.severity,
  sai.title,
  sai.description,
  sai.fix_suggestion,
  sai.estimated_impact,
  sai.page_url,
  sai.file_path,
  sai.acceptance_criteria,
  sai.affected_files
FROM speed_audit_items sai
WHERE sai.audit_id = '{{ $('Generate Response').first().json.audit_id }}'
  AND sai.approved = TRUE
ORDER BY 
  CASE sai.severity 
    WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 
    WHEN 'high' THEN 2 
    WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 
    ELSE 4 
  END,
  sai.item_code;

UPDATE speed_audits 
SET 
  prd_generated_at = NOW(),
  prd_file_path = '.planning/speed-prd-{{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}.json'
WHERE id = '{{ $('Generate Response').first().json.audit_id }}';
